TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Pae/ Payay/ Payay = Meniq quri pae ga ta phmaun hini, kingal knkawas mndaha mhuma, idas 2 texal ma qbrungung daha idas 6, bobo na dungan ge, idas 8 ma qbrungung daha idas 11. Pae nii ppuqun ta ita Seediq saya duri. ‚ÜĶ Bobo snebuc pae de, ngalan ta it Seediq ka ware pae, sbege daha uuqun na dapa, slmeyan daha rudu tnbugan, slmeyan daha qqeyaq lmiwaq purc yqeyaq hiiya ma, duma naq we gtuun daha yqeyaq han ma slmaqun daha dungan, ririh so gnmalu dheran yqeyaq ka so nii duri. ‚ÜĶ Tnbesan na tnabus nii ge, ngalan mqedil ta ita Seediq, psaan daha so btuku ka tnabus daha ka ware nuqah han, pheung daha ma rtretul na betaq mhenuk ka ware nuqah, kika ngalun daha ka ware nuqah han ma, splhelah na tnabus dungan, so nii mhenuk ware nuqah de ma leexan stinu denu mesa.
S.PHON: = pa…ô/ pajaj/ pajaj = m…ôniq qu…ĺi pa…ô ga ta pńßmaun ńßini, kiŇčal knkawas mndańßa mńßuma, idas * t…ôxal ma qb…ĺuŇčuŇč dańßa idas *, bobo na duŇčan g…ô, idas * ma qb…ĺuŇčuŇč dańßa idas **. pa…ô nii ppuqun ta ita s…ô…ôdiq saja du…ĺi. * bobo sn…ôbu ¶ pa…ô d…ô, Ňčalan ta it s…ô…ôdiq ka wa…ĺ…ô pa…ô, sb…ôg…ô dańßa uuqun na dapa, slm…ôan dańßa …ĺudu tnbugan, slm…ôan dańßa qq…ôaq lmiwaq pu…ĺ ¶ jq…ôaq ńßiija ma, duma naq w…ô gtuun dańßa jq…ôaq ńßan ma slmaqun dańßa duŇčan, …ĺi…ĺińß so gnmalu dńß…ô…ĺan jq…ôaq ka so nii du…ĺi. * tnb…ôsan na tnabus nii g…ô, Ňčalan mq…ôdil ta ita s…ô…ôdiq, psaan dańßa so btuku ka tnabus dańßa ka wa…ĺ…ô nuqańß ńßan, pńß…ôuŇč dańßa ma …ĺt…ĺ…ôtul na b…ôtaq mńß…ônuk ka wa…ĺ…ô nuqańß, kika Ňčalun dańßa ka wa…ĺ…ô nuqańß ńßan ma, splńß…ôlańß na tnabus duŇčan, so nii mńß…ônuk wa…ĺ…ô nuqańß d…ô ma l…ô…ôxan stinu d…ônu m…ôsa.
S.FORM: = Pae/ Payay/ Payay = Meniq quri pae ga ta phmaun hini, kingal knkawas mndaha mhuma, idas 2 texal ma qbrungung daha idas 6, bobo na dungan ge, idas 8 ma qbrungung daha idas 11. Pae nii ppuqun ta ita Seediq saya duri. ‚ÜĶ Bobo snebuc pae de, ngalan ta it Seediq ka ware pae, sbege daha uuqun na dapa, slmeyan daha rudu tnbugan, slmeyan daha qqeyaq lmiwaq purc yqeyaq hiiya ma, duma naq we gtuun daha yqeyaq han ma slmaqun daha dungan, ririh so gnmalu dheran yqeyaq ka so nii duri. ‚ÜĶ Tnbesan na tnabus nii ge, ngalan mqedil ta ita Seediq, psaan daha so btuku ka tnabus daha ka ware nuqah han, pheung daha ma rtretul na betaq mhenuk ka ware nuqah, kika ngalun daha ka ware nuqah han ma, splhelah na tnabus dungan, so nii mhenuk ware nuqah de ma leexan stinu denu mesa.
S.PHON: = pa…ô/ pajaj/ pajaj = m…ôniq qu…ĺi pa…ô ga ta pńßmaun ńßini, kiŇčal knkawas mndańßa mńßuma, idas * t…ôxal ma qb…ĺuŇčuŇč dańßa idas *, bobo na duŇčan g…ô, idas * ma qb…ĺuŇčuŇč dańßa idas **. pa…ô nii ppuqun ta ita s…ô…ôdiq saja du…ĺi. * bobo sn…ôbu ¶ pa…ô d…ô, Ňčalan ta it s…ô…ôdiq ka wa…ĺ…ô pa…ô, sb…ôg…ô dańßa uuqun na dapa, slm…ôan dańßa …ĺudu tnbugan, slm…ôan dańßa qq…ôaq lmiwaq pu…ĺ ¶ jq…ôaq ńßiija ma, duma naq w…ô gtuun dańßa jq…ôaq ńßan ma slmaqun dańßa duŇčan, …ĺi…ĺińß so gnmalu dńß…ô…ĺan jq…ôaq ka so nii du…ĺi. * tnb…ôsan na tnabus nii g…ô, Ňčalan mq…ôdil ta ita s…ô…ôdiq, psaan dańßa so btuku ka tnabus dańßa ka wa…ĺ…ô nuqańß ńßan, pńß…ôuŇč dańßa ma …ĺt…ĺ…ôtul na b…ôtaq mńß…ônuk ka wa…ĺ…ô nuqańß, kika Ňčalun dańßa ka wa…ĺ…ô nuqańß ńßan ma, splńß…ôlańß na tnabus duŇčan, so nii mńß…ônuk wa…ĺ…ô nuqańß d…ô ma l…ô…ôxan stinu d…ônu m…ôsa.
